title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 6 - Generating (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introductory computer science course. This video is Chapter 6 on "Generating" from the Introduction to Artificial Intelligence course taught by Brian Yu and David J. Malan. The course is available through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
writeup: This is Chapter 6, "Generating," from CS50's Introduction to Artificial Intelligence, Harvard's intro computer science course, taught by Brian Yu and David J. Malan. The chapter centers on generative AI. The session is presented live and unedited, and the broader course is available through edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
